# Covers three deeper mess-integration pieces together: an identity's mess-agent
# mapping (--mess-agent), a self-service notification opt-out (identity notify),
# and a pipeline-level topic broadcast (notify_topic) — all via a fake `mess`
# script on PATH, hermetic like notify_mess.txt.
env BREEZE_DIR=$WORK/state
env PATH=$WORK/bin:$PATH
chmod 0755 bin/mess

exec breeze identity register admin
cp stdout admin.token
exec breeze identity register alice --mess-agent alice-on-mess
exec breeze identity register carol
exec breeze identity register ci
exec breeze role assign reviewer alice --as admin --token-file admin.token
exec breeze role assign reviewer carol --as admin --token-file admin.token

# carol opts out of breeze's mess notifications entirely.
exec breeze identity notify off --as carol

# Regression check: `ps` and `role list` are two separate RPC handlers that both
# render IdentityInfo — MessAgent/NotifyOptOut must show up in BOTH, not just one
# (a real bug found live: role.list's handler had its own inline IdentityInfo
# construction that never got these fields added).
exec breeze ps --json
stdout '"messAgent":\s*"alice-on-mess"'
exec breeze role list --json
stdout '"messAgent":\s*"alice-on-mess"'
stdout '"notifyOptOut":\s*true'

exec breeze apply -f pipeline.hcl --as admin --token-file admin.token
exec breeze stage start release build abc123 --as ci
exec sleep 0.5

exists mess-calls.log
# alice is notified via her MAPPED mess-agent name, not her raw identity name.
grep '^send alice-on-mess breeze: release/build \(abc123\) -> succeeded$' mess-calls.log
! grep 'send alice ' mess-calls.log
# carol opted out entirely.
! grep 'carol' mess-calls.log
# the pipeline's notify_topic gets the same resolution published to it regardless
# of the per-identity targets above.
grep '^pub #release-activity breeze: release/build \(abc123\) -> succeeded$' mess-calls.log

exec breeze stop

-- bin/mess --
#!/bin/sh
echo "$@" >> mess-calls.log

-- pipeline.hcl --
pipeline "release" {
  notify_topic = "#release-activity"

  stage "build" {
    type    = "command"
    timeout = "10s"
    command = ["/bin/sh", "-c", "true"]
  }
  stage "review" {
    type               = "approval"
    required_approvals = 1
    approver_role       = "reviewer"
  }
}
